paper_title: A Tree Ring Measurement Method Based on Error Correction in Digital Image of Stem Analysis Disk

methods.description: This method involves measuring the tree ring radius using digital images and correcting for geometric distortion to improve accuracy.

steps.description: Preprocessed the original digital image. The preprocessing process includes image graying and binary.
steps.searchable_summary: convert image to grayscale and binary format

steps.description: Extract the pixel coordinates of annual rings, use pixel distance and actual distance to get the scale, measure the annual ring radius data of image.
steps.searchable_summary: extract pixel coordinates and calculate scale for ring radius measurement

steps.description: Establish the geometric distortion correction model by error value and the ring radius pixel distance.
Establish the regression model of annual ring radius based on error correction and test its accuracy.
steps.searchable_summary: develop and validate regression model for ring radius

methods.description: This method corrects measurement errors in tree ring radius by constructing a prediction model based on error correction.

steps.description: Determine the basic equation. The computer image pixel distance formula (Equation (1)) and scale formula (Equation (2)) are selected as the basic model.

Establish the error correction function. The pixel distance to the pith will affect the error value, therefore, the error correction function u(x) is constructed with the pixel distance from the ring to the pith as the variable.
steps.searchable_summary: create error correction function based on pixel distance
inputs: pixel distance from ring to pith

steps.description: Determine the combination form of basic function and error correction function. In this paper, the basic function and correction function are combined in an unstructured way to establish the ring radius's regression equation based on error correction.
steps.searchable_summary: combine basic and error correction functions for regression equation
